nasb.text: There will be silence before You, and praise in Zion, O God, And to You the vow will be performed.

esv.text: Praise is due to you, O God, in Zion, and to you shall vows be performed.

cnv.text: 神啊！在錫安城裡， 人們都在等候要頌讚你， 他們也要向你償還所許的願。

ccb.text: 上帝啊， 人们在锡安赞美你， 向你履行誓言。

csbs.text: 神哪，在锡安，赞美等候着你， 所许的愿也要向你偿还！
